summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GradNext Iteration 5 features. All 7 requested features are working correctly: Workshop creation from admin panel, Workshop form fields (Instructor Name, Instructor Title, Meeting Link), Workshop display on candidate dashboard with instructor->mentor_name mapping, Videos display with thumbnails, Materials display, and Workshop edit functionality.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error due to peer_availability field type mismatch (expects List[str] but DB has List[dict])

critical_code_review_comments: WorkshopCreate model requires 'topics' field but frontend form doesn't have a topics input - workshops are created with empty topics array which works but may need UI field
peer_availability field in User model (List[str]) doesn't match DB schema (List[dict]) causing mock-login failures for 'free' user type
updated_files: /app/tests/test_iteration5_workshops.py - Created comprehensive test suite for iteration 5 features
seed_data_creation: Test workshops created and cleaned up during testing (TEST_ and UI Test prefixes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified working. Workshop form has Instructor Name, Instructor Title, Meeting Link fields. instructor field maps to mentor_name for candidate view. Videos display with thumbnails. Materials display with categories and View buttons.

workshop_creation_from_admin.details: Workshop creation modal opens, all fields work, workshop saves successfully without errors

workshop_form_fields.details: Form includes: Title, Description, Date, Time, Duration, Max Participants, Instructor Name, Instructor Title, Status dropdown, Meeting Link (for upcoming/live), Thumbnail upload, Recording URL/Upload (for completed), Free Access checkbox

workshop_display_on_candidate_dashboard.details: Workshops appear on /dashboard/workshops with mentor_name (mapped from instructor), date, time, and Join Workshop button

workshop_meeting_link_for_join_button.details: Meeting link field is saved and available for Join Workshop functionality

videos_display_with_thumbnails.details: Videos page shows 12 lessons with thumbnails, duration, module categories, and course progress tracker

materials_display_on_candidate_dashboard.details: Materials page shows all materials with categories (Casebook, Template, Industry Primer, Guide, Framework), search, and View buttons

workshop_edit_button.details: Edit button opens modal with pre-filled data, shows 'Save Changes' button, includes Recording URL and ChunkedFileUpload for completed workshops

mocked_apis.payments: Razorpay payments are MOCKED (no API keys configured)
